problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
